is_downpayment.name: is_downpayment
is_downpayment.help_text: Down payments are made when creating invoices from a sales order. They are not copied when duplicating a sales order.

is_expense.name: is_expense
is_expense.help_text: Is true if the sales order line comes from an expense or a vendor bills

product_uom_category_id.name: product_uom_category_id
product_uom_category_id.help_text: Conversion between Units of Measure can only occur if they belong to the same category. The conversion will be made based on the ratios.

customer_lead.name: customer_lead
customer_lead.help_text: Number of days between the order confirmation and the shipping of the products to the customer

qty_delivered_method.name: qty_delivered_method
qty_delivered_method.help_text:
According to product configuration, the delivered quantity can be automatically computed by mechanism:
  - Manual: the quantity is set manually on the line
  - Analytic From expenses: the quantity is the quantity sum from posted expenses
  - Timesheet: the quantity is the sum of hours recorded on tasks linked to this sale line
  - Stock Moves: the quantity comes from confirmed pickings

product_type.name: product_type
product_type.help_text:
Goods are tangible materials and merchandise you provide.
A service is a non-material product you provide.

company_price_include.name: company_price_include
company_price_include.help_text: Default on whether the sales price used on the product and invoices with this Company includes its taxes.

purchase_line_ids.name: purchase_line_ids
purchase_line_ids.help_text: Purchase line generated by this Sales item on order confirmation, or when the quantity was increased.

product_document_ids.name: product_document_ids
product_document_ids.help_text: The product documents for this order line that will be merged in the PDF quote.

is_visible.name: is_visible
is_visible.help_text: Select this to show the sell line in the quote. If not enabled,the buy and sell both won't included in the section and quote totals,unless Calculate Buy is selected.

require_signature.name: require_signature
require_signature.help_text: Request a online signature from the customer to confirm the order.

is_buy_included_in_total.name: is_buy_included_in_total
is_buy_included_in_total.help_text: Select this to include the buy rate in the section and quote totals, even if the line is invisible.

section_id.name: section_id
section_id.help_text: Select a sales section to load it into the sale order when the order is saved.

section_line_id.name: section_line_id
section_line_id.help_text: The section line that this sale order line belongs to.
